case_title: UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION VS. ROILAN CUISON AYALA et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
SUPPLEMENT TO CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYALA, ROILAN CUISON AYALA, CYRIL AYALA, TERESITA $11,997.55 PRINCIPAL, $1,975.81 INTEREST, $480.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,453.36, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, ROILAN CUISON AYALA, CYRIL AYALA, TERESITA DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-27-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-23-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-11-2004

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT NO TRIAL DATE SET. ALL DEFENDANTS IN ACTION DEFAULTED AND THIS MATTER WILL PROCEED TO DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NO TIME ESTIMATE GIVEN FOR THIS REASON. FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2004 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE APR-30-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, ROILAN CUISON AYALA, CYRIL AYALA, TERESITA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION SERVED NOV-05-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, CYRIL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $480.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, ROILAN CUISON AYALA, CYRIL AYALA, TERESITA
AFFIDAVIT OF ROBIN GASKIN AUTHORIZED REPRESENTATIVE OF PLTFF. FOR COURT JUDGMENT UNDER CCP 585(D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 100
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-30-2004 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF UNITED SERVICES AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION SERVED NOV-06-2003, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AYALA, ROILAN CUISON AYALA, TERESITA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-27-2004 CONTINUED TO APR-30-2004 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
